allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; logs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); errors=[l for l in logs if l.get\('type'\)=='error']; print\(json.dumps\(errors[:5], indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; logs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(logs[0] if logs else 'empty'\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('vercel/node:', '@vercel/node' in deps\)")
